title: Narcotic incense
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}}
'''Narcotic incense''' was a substance that when burned produced an aromatic smoke that was capable of stimulating or depressing the [[nervous system]]s of beings who inhaled it. The various states of euphoria that a user experienced during this process gave narcotic incense a highly addictive quality. However, one notable drawback of the use of narcotic incense was that [[Death/Legends|death]] was a symptom of prolonged exposure to it.

==Behind the scenes==
Narcotic incense made its only appearance as one the various airborne substances that [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] inhale when they enter a tavern in the novel ''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]]''. Though the novel did not expound upon just what it was, the entry for narcotic incense in the [[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe|first edition of ''A Guide to the Star Wars Universe'']], which reached two sentences in length, considerably increased the depth of knowledge regarding the topic.

Narcotic incense was later given a profile in a sidebar regarding a number of illicit drugs in the article "[[Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villainy]]." With the statement that "Prolonged exposure has absolutely lethal effects,"<ref name="Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villainy">{{InsiderCite|89|Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villainy}}</ref> the article appears to contradict ''A Guide to the Star Wars Universe''{{'s}} assertion that it "addicting to some life forms and quite lethal to others."<ref name="A Guide to the Star Wars Universe">''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]''</ref>
